evals.prompt: How should I structure a 12-week online course?
evals.expected_output: Course structure recommendation with modules, lessons, and delivery cadence for a 12-week program.

assertions.name: module_structure
assertions.description: Must recommend organizing content into modules (3-4 modules for 12 weeks)

assertions.name: drip_delivery
assertions.description: Must discuss drip content delivery for a multi-week course

assertions.name: lesson_format
assertions.description: Must cover lesson structure within modules (video, workbook, action items)

evals.prompt: My membership has 40% annual churn — how do I reduce it?
evals.expected_output: Churn diagnosis and reduction strategy addressing onboarding, engagement, pricing, and community.

assertions.name: onboarding_focus
assertions.description: Must address onboarding as a key churn reduction lever

assertions.name: annual_pricing
assertions.description: Must recommend annual plan incentives to reduce churn

assertions.name: community_engagement
assertions.description: Must discuss community engagement for retention

evals.prompt: Set up a course in Groove with drip content and multiple access levels
evals.expected_output: Step-by-step guide for creating a course in GrooveMember with drip scheduling and tiered access levels connected to GrooveSell products.

assertions.name: groovemember_reference
assertions.description: Must reference GrooveMember as the course/membership tool

assertions.name: access_levels
assertions.description: Must explain how to configure multiple access levels

assertions.name: groovesell_connection
assertions.description: Must mention connecting access levels to GrooveSell products for payment
